Question Text: how many states border on the state whose capital is boston
Truth Query: SELECT COUNT( BORDER_INFOalias0.BORDER ) FROM BORDER_INFO AS BORDER_INFOalias0 WHERE BORDER_INFOalias0.STATE_NAME = ( SELECT STATEalias0.STATE_NAME FROM STATE AS STATEalias0 WHERE STATEalias0.CAPITAL = "boston" ) ;
LLM Query: select count(*) from border_info where border in (select state_name from state where capital = 'boston')

Question Text: what are the major cities in the states through which the major river in virginia runs
Truth Query: SELECT CITYalias0.CITY_NAME FROM CITY AS CITYalias0 WHERE CITYalias0.POPULATION > 150000 AND CITYalias0.STATE_NAME IN ( SELECT RIVERalias0.TRAVERSE FROM RIVER AS RIVERalias0 WHERE RIVERalias0.RIVER_NAME IN ( SELECT RIVERalias1.RIVER_NAME FROM RIVER AS RIVERalias1 WHERE RIVERalias1.LENGTH > 750 AND RIVERalias1.TRAVERSE = "virginia" ) ) ;
LLM Query: select t2.city_name from river as t1 inner join city as t2 on t1.traverse = t2.state_name where t1.river_name = 'major river' and t1.traverse = 'virginia' and t2.population > 150000

Question Text: which states does not border texas
Truth Query: SELECT STATEalias0.STATE_NAME FROM STATE AS STATEalias0 WHERE STATEalias0.STATE_NAME NOT IN ( SELECT BORDER_INFOalias0.BORDER FROM BORDER_INFO AS BORDER_INFOalias0 WHERE BORDER_INFOalias0.STATE_NAME = "texas" ) ;
LLM Query: select state_name from state where state_name not in (select border from border_info where state_name = 'texas') and state_name != 'texas'

Question Text: how many states border the largest state
Truth Query: SELECT COUNT( BORDER_INFOalias0.BORDER ) FROM BORDER_INFO AS BORDER_INFOalias0 WHERE BORDER_INFOalias0.STATE_NAME = ( SELECT STATEalias0.STATE_NAME FROM STATE AS STATEalias0 WHERE STATEalias0.AREA = ( SELECT MAX( STATEalias1.AREA ) FROM STATE AS STATEalias1 ) ) ;
LLM Query: select count(t2.border) from state as t1 inner join border_info as t2 on t1.state_name = t2.state_name where t1.area = (select max(area) from state)

Question Text: what is the longest river in the state with the highest point
Truth Query: SELECT RIVERalias0.RIVER_NAME FROM HIGHLOW AS HIGHLOWalias0 , RIVER AS RIVERalias0 WHERE HIGHLOWalias0.HIGHEST_ELEVATION = ( SELECT MAX( HIGHLOWalias1.HIGHEST_ELEVATION ) FROM HIGHLOW AS HIGHLOWalias1 ) AND RIVERalias0.TRAVERSE = HIGHLOWalias0.STATE_NAME ORDER BY RIVERalias0.LENGTH DESC LIMIT 1 ;
LLM Query:
select r.river_name, r.length 
from river r 
join state s on r.country_name = s.country_name 
join highlow h on s.state_name = h.state_name 
order by h.highest_elevation desc, r.length desc 
limit 1
